name: HMC Intelligent Manhole Cover Monitor
desc: Smart manhole cover monitor with unauthorized-opening alerts and 24/7 IoT status tracking.
overview: The HMC Intelligent Manhole Cover Monitoring Instrument detects unauthorised opening, displacement, vibration, flooding and methane gas accumulation in urban drainage systems. BeiDou / GPS positioning for accurate location tracking. 4G / LoRa communication with 6-year battery life. IP67 waterproof and explosion-proof rated for underground environments.

specs.label: Monitoring (advanced)
specs.value: Tilt / displacement + flooding + water level + methane gas

specs.label: Mechanical lock
specs.value: Customisable (matched with full manhole cover system)

features: Multi-state real-time monitoring: tilt, displacement and vibration sensors detect unauthorised opening — triggers instant audio/visual alert and platform notification
Smart remote control: 4G + Bluetooth communication; remote lock/unlock of cover (integrated-lock variant)
Precise GPS / BeiDou positioning for rapid dispatch to exact fault or missing-cover location
High-strength composite housing (helmet-grade material): impact-resistant, corrosion-resistant; IP67 / IP68
Predictive maintenance: low-battery alarm and self-diagnostic; auto-generates maintenance reports
Flexible expansion: add water-level sensor, CH₄ gas sensor, temperature, humidity as required
